property.name: java.library.path

ikol\.jdks\openjdk-26 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\SqlCmd\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.0 in;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.0\libnvvp;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\Nsight Compute 2022.4.0\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Calibre2\;C:\Users
ikol\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users
ikol\.dotnet	ools;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;C:\Users
ikol\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users

testcase.name: contextLoads

16:03:19.266 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [org.example.bibliotekaui.BibliotekaUiApplicationTests]: BibliotekaUiApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:03:19.361 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration org.example.bibliotekaui.BibliotekaUiApplication for test class org.example.bibliotekaui.BibliotekaUiApplicationTests
